# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources: 
  MyVPC: 
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties: 
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
  
  InternetGateway: 
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  AttachGateway: 
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties: 
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway
  
  PublicSubnet1: 
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties: 
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
  
  PublicSubnet2: 
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties: 
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
  
  DBInstance: 
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties: 
      AllocatedStorage: '50'
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.small
      Engine: MySQL
      MasterUsername: root
      VPCSecurityGroups: 
        - !Ref MySG
  
  MySG: 
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties: 
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access via port 22
      SecurityGroupIngress: 
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: '22'
          ToPort: '22'
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0  
    
  MyEC2Instance: 
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties: 
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-8c1becc7
      KeyName: myKeyPair
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  
  MyBucket: 
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
  
  LoadBalancer: 
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties: 
      Scheme: internet-facing
      Subnets: 
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups: 
        - !Ref MySG
